data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for informational task status. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for warnings on overdue tasks, blocked dependencies, or assignment conflicts. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for blocking failures (task persistence, transition rejection). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for critical task incidents (board corruption, mass-update failure). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on the task save / commit button. Imperative; sentence case. Block-scoped pilot string for cascade verification.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on dismiss/abort buttons in task dialogs. Imperative; sentence case. Distinct from any future "cancel task" domain action.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on retry button after a failed task save / move. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Empty-state placeholder shown while the task board is loading. Trailing horizontal ellipsis (U+2026).
